summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival injects fresh momentum into Ferrari's championship push after weeks of doubt clouded the Scuderia's ability to challenge McLaren's pace. McLaren's strategic gambit with their dual-threat driver lineup creates an unpredictable variable in pit-wall decisions, particularly as tire degradation tests both teams' tactical acumen around Spa's demanding layout. A victory here would cement Hamilton's immediate impact at Maranello and reshape the constructors' championship trajectory heading into the sport's second half.
